If Milo disappears tomorrow, your business doesn't.

For enterprise customers we offer a code-escrow agreement: a third-party escrow holds a copy of Milo's source code and configuration. If we cease operations, you receive a release and can run Milo on your own infrastructure.

It's a clause we add to the master agreement, not a separate product. Standard for the customer profile this room represents.

Your data stays where it lives. Anthropic processes the question — never the rows.
